[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] '''Kyril Lopaki''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and soldier in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Fresh from the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], Lopaki was stationed on board an [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that was assigned to track down the stolen [[Starship/Legends|starship]] known as the ''[[Staraker]]''. However, just as the ship had tracked the ''Staraker'' to the [[Alashan system/Legends|Alashan system]], a [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alashan]] fired and struck the ship, critically damaging it.

Lopaki and five other Imperials including [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Wil'm Grau]], [[Fleet Sergeant]] [[Anarine]], and stormtroopers [[Voss (stormtrooper)|Voss]], [[Eger Djambo|Éger Djambo]], and [[Boaz]] were able to escape the ship in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. After landing on the planet, Major Grau succeeded in leading the group in capturing the crew members of the ''Staraker'' including [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mici Shabandar]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Lopaki wished to capture Leia Organa and return her to the Emperor, but Grau had other ideas. Knowing that they were stranded on the planet, he agreed to a truce, to the chagrin of Lopaki.

As the team scoured the planet, Lopaki proved his cowardice, when he refused to save trooper [[Boaz]] from a landslide for fear of risking his own life. Eventually, the team came upon a great tunnel which led into an ancient underground city called [[Unidentified Alashan city|Forever]]. Inside, the team began to be stalked by the [[Sentinel (creature)|Guardian of Forever]] who tried to destroy the intruders. However, Lopaki was more concerned about capturing the Rebels, and he tracked them to the [[Alashan control center|Forever control center]]. Holding Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa at blaster point, Lopaki prepared to bring the two back to the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]]. Unfortunately for the Ensign, the Guardian showed up at that point, determined to protect the complex. Lopaki fired at the beast with his [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], but the Guardian shrugged off the attack and struck the Ensign with a powerful blow, killing him.
